Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", approx_percentile(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade__quartiles", approx_percentile(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", ARRAY[0, 0.02, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.98, 1]) FILTER (WHERE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" != 0) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade__nonzero_quartiles" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/00b1b3a180da21b83b0cdbdfc96ebf8d13258b2fc1661c3ced2f9f231ef86b7d/a52fc5ba-1e80-4987-bb43-b7becd414721/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
